name: Cafe Bara
author: Poki
description: Cafe Bara is a cafe management game where you play as a hardworking capybara running the coziest little restaurant! Whip up dishes by putting the right ingredients in the right order, keep your customers happy, and earn money for your efforts. Use your earnings to unlock fun cosmetics and dress up your capybara in the cutest outfits. Ready to serve up smiles and style? How to play Cafe Bara? Click and hold to move the food to the plate. Who created Cafe Bara? Cafe Bara is created by Kuyi Mobile. Play their other games on Poki: Coin Machine , Sushi Merge and Tower Merge ! How can I play Cafe Bara for free? You can play Cafe Bara for free on Poki. Can I play Cafe Bara on mobile devices and desktop? Cafe Bara can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
